message:
test(agent,vcr): edge-case tests for message queue, abort, turn events, and VCR

agent.rs - Message queue edge cases:
- message_queue_seq_saturates_at_u64_max: verifies sequence number
  saturating arithmetic when next_seq is u64::MAX
- message_queue_follow_up_all_mode_drains_entire_queue_in_order:
  verifies QueueMode::All drains all follow-ups in insertion order

agent.rs - Abort behavior:
- Add CountingProvider test double that tracks stream() call count
- abort_before_run_skips_provider_stream_call: verifies that
  pre-signaled abort returns StopReason::Aborted without ever
  calling the provider, preventing wasted API calls

agent.rs - Turn event coverage:
- Add EchoTool test double implementing the Tool trait
- Add ScriptedProvider with multi-turn scripting (text reply →
  tool_use → final text) for deterministic agent loop testing
- turn_events_include_tool_results_and_final_text: verifies the
  full AgentSession run produces TurnStart/TurnEnd/ToolResult/
  TurnStart/TurnEnd event sequence with correct tool output
- turn_events_stream_text_deltas: verifies TextDelta events arrive
  for simple text responses

vcr.rs improvements:
- Add env_test_lock() for thread-safe environment variable tests
- vcr_mode_from_env_values_and_invalid: tests VcrMode::from_env
  for all valid modes (record, PLAYBACK, Auto) and invalid input
- auto_mode_records_missing_cassette_then_replays_existing: verifies
  Auto mode records on first call and plays back without hitting
  the network on second call
- playback_mismatch_returns_strict_error_with_debug_hashes: verifies
  that mismatched request bodies produce descriptive error messages
  with hash diagnostics for debugging cassette drift
- Helper functions set_test_env_var/restore_test_env_var for safe
  environment manipulation in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
